heading: Financial assistance to certain employees in acquisition of critical skills
label: 1599a Financial assistance to certain employees in acquisition of critical skills
notes: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a). substituted “()” for “( note)”.Pub. L. 113–29150 U.S.C. 361450 U.S.C. 4022013—Subsec. (a). substituted “National Security Agency Act” for “National Security Act”.Pub. L. 112–239
amendments: Amendments2014—Subsec. (a). substituted “()” for “( note)”.Pub. L. 113–29150 U.S.C. 361450 U.S.C. 4022013—Subsec. (a). substituted “National Security Agency Act” for “National Security Act”.Pub. L. 112–239

children.heading: .—Training Program
children.label: a .—Training Program
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall establish an undergraduate training program with respect to civilian employees in the Military Department Civilian Intelligence Personnel Management System that is similar in purpose, conditions, content, and administration to the program established by the Secretary of Defense under section 16 of the National Security Agency Act of 1959 () for civilian employees of the National Security Agency.50 U.S.C. 3614

children.heading: .—Use of Funds for Training Program
children.label: b .—Use of Funds for Training Program
children.text: Any payment made by the Secretary to carry out the program required to be established by subsection (a) may be made in any fiscal year only to the extent that appropriated funds are available for that purpose.
